description: Triggers for salary negotiation preparation including scripts, market data, and strategy

queries.query: Help me negotiate this job offer — I think it's below market
Prepare me to counter-offer this salary with scripts and strategy
I have two competing offers — help me use them to negotiate higher compensation
What should I say when they ask me what salary I expect?
Build my salary negotiation strategy for this executive offer
I got an offer but I'm uncomfortable negotiating — give me word-for-word scripts
Negotiate not just base salary but also equity, bonus, and signing bonus
Research market rates for this role and help me determine my ask
The recruiter said the salary is fixed — how do I still negotiate?
Help me respond to a lowball offer without losing the opportunity
Compare my two job offers to decide which to take
Write a cover letter for this position
Optimize my LinkedIn profile for job searching
Prepare me for the behavioral interview at this company
Tailor my resume for this specific job description
Help me understand the equity structure in my offer letter
Build a reference list for my applications
Analyze this job description for fit with my background
Write resume bullets for my engineering experience
Build my LinkedIn profile for product management roles
